div.h1: Symbol Resolution: Local vs Global/Weak Bifurcation
div.p: Implementation Spec: ELF64 Symbol Resolution Logic LOCAL symbols → file-local cache only (Internal linkage) GLOBAL/WEAK symbols → global table with resolution logic (External linkage)

ol.li: STB_LOCAL symbols are excluded from the dynamic symbol table (.dynsym)
STB_WEAK allows libraries to define symbols that the application can override
SHN_COMMON is for uninitialized globals (BSS candidates)

div.p: Strong + Strong ERROR: Linker exits with multiple definition of '...'
Strong + Weak RULE: Strong symbol wins. Weak definition is discarded.
Weak + Weak RULE: First definition encountered wins.
COMMON + COMMON RULE: Largest size allocation wins.
Strong + Undefined RULE: Resolution success. Relocations patched.
Weak Undef RULE: Resolves to NULL (0). No error if not found.
